title: Yikki Lunch Bags for Women Men, Reusable Insulated Leakproof Lunch Box Tote Bag, Cool Bags for Kids Girls Boys Adults, Thermal Cooler Bag for Work School Picnic Travel (Black)
features: Suitable Size: 10.1"H x 9"L x 5.2"W. Our lightweight and portable designed lunch bags are perfect for packing lunch boxes, fruit, drinks, snacks, and more. Meet all your work and travel needs

Excellent Lunch Bag: The exterior of our lunch bag is made of oxford cloth fabric, which is durable and waterproof. The middle layer is 5mm pearl cotton, and the inside is aluminum foil, 100% non-toxic, BPA-free, and absolutely heat insulation, keeping food cool or warm

Excellent Design: A variety of colors to choose from, simple and stylish. The dual handle design is durable and tear-resistant. Large Velcro closure, easy to take and close. Easy to clean, just wipe with a paper towel
Multifunctional: Our lunch bags can be used as ice packs, shopping bags, snack bags, and more, perfect for work, school, picnics, travel, outings, and more

Satisfaction Guarantee: High-quality material, the excellent design lunch bag is worth your choice. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us by email, we will help you solve the problem within 24 hours
